titleStmt.title: SII 23.127: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 127. (A.R. No. 127 of 1907.) Pāppāṉkuḷam, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Siddhajñānēśvara temple—on the same wall Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara

summary.p: This is also an inscription of the same king. The regnal year is lost but the details of date can be read as (Makara) ba. 14, Thursday, Anusham. It registers another sale of land in their village by the same Ūravar of Vikramapāṇḍya-nallūr to the temple for 928 Daṉapāla-guḷigai-paṇam. This also refers to a previous mortgage of the land made in the 8th year of the king, with two individuals by name Vāṇarāyar and Śūlapāṇippiḷḷai for 728 paṇam which seems to have been paid back now to the mortgagees out of this sale amount.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu[ vaṉaccakrava] ttikaḷ śrī kulacekharate vaṟku [ makara māsam] Aparakhakṣattu catut
deciyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉuṣattunāḷ Uṭaiyār tirunel veliyuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam muḷḷināṭṭuc ceraṉaiveṉṟāṉ
tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Uṭaiyār karuttaṟintu muṭitta pāṇṭīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭecuṟa tevaṟku Innāṭṭu kaṟku
ṟicciyāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyanallūr Ūrkkucamainta Ūravarom vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷūṟpaṟṟu Ulakuyya vanta pa
ṉmaṉ kuḷappaṟṟukkum Itaṉ kiḻttiṟappāy viṟṟa puṉceyk Ellai yāvatu kiḻellai Eṅkaḷūṟ paṟṟāy nāṅkaḷ paratecinallūṟku tiruvi
ṭikku Inta tiruvāḻik Uṭaikku meṟkum teṉellai ceraṉai veṉṟāṉ tirumaṭaiviḷā
kattu vaṭavellaikkum paṟṟukku vaṭamelmulaiyil paṭṭarpāṟai yil veṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku vaṭakkil A
paṭṭarpāṟaiyil veṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukkum meṟkum Ik l teṉellaiyil kiḻmelāka vanta velippeṟṟa cevvaikku mi
paṭṭaṉeriyil vaṭavellaiyil niṟkiṟa tiruvāḻikkallup peṟṟa cev vaikkum coḻaṉeriyil paṟṟil vaṭavellaiyil velipeṟṟa
cevvaikku vaṭakkum melellai kopurameḻippallavaraiyaṉkoṭṭai kiḻaiveli peṟṟa cevvaikkum vaṭakku te
ṟkkil periyamaṭattukku Ellai Aṟutikku cevvaikku kiḻakkum Āka Innāṉke
llaikkuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparappum naṉceyyum puṉceyyum nattamun nattappāḻum melṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇa
ṟum teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmaitavaḻiyum miṉpaṭupaḷḷamum teṉpaṭu putampum cekkiṟai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭamum
maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa camattap piṟāttikaḷum nāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyapaṭiyilec celavolaiyāka viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇi
kkuṭuttom Ūṟkucamainta Ūravarom Āticaṇṭecuvara tevaṟku Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamuṅ kuḷa
pparappum naṉceyyum puṉceyyum nattamum nattappālum meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum puṟṟun teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmaitava
ḻiyum miṉpaṭupaḷḷamun teṉpaṭu putampum cekkiṟai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭamu maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa camattappiṟāptikaḷukkum Em
milicaintu vilainiṟceyitta taṉapālak kuḷikai 9 100 2 10 8 Ippaṇam toḷāyirattu Irupattu Eṭṭukkum poruṭcelavāvatu Ikkuḷap
paṟṟu muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ kaiyāl Oṟṟiyuṭaiya vāṇarāyaṟkum cūlapā ṇip piḷḷaikkum Oṟṟivaitta Oṟṟi Olaikkuk kuṭuppitta śrī
Eṅkaḷ Ūril Eṭṭāvatu kārvakaikaḷukku vāṅkiṉa ṭṭa 7 100 2 10 8- m Āka ṭṭa 9 100 2 10 8 Ippaṇam toḷāyirattu Irupatteṭṭum Innāyaṉār ko
yilukku taṉmakattāvāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiyakkuḷakkiḻ nelkkuppai yuṭaiyāṉ kāḷamekam Aḻakāṇṭārāṉa nāyaṉār kāṅkayaṟkuk kārā
ṇmaikkāṇiyum kaṭamai Innāyaṉār karuttaṟintu muṭitta pāṇṭīcura muṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nittal nimantaṅka
ḷukkum tirunāḷukkumāka viṟṟu Innāyaṉār kāṅkeyar karuvukolak kāval nampipakkalile paṟṟiyum paṟṟik kuṭuppittum poruṭcelavāka cātti viṟṟu
vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Innāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparappum naṉceyyum puṉceyyum nattamum nattappālum meṉo
kkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum puṟṟunteṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmai tavaḻiyum miṉpaṭupaḷḷamum teṉpaṭu putampum cekkiṟai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭo
li taṭṭārpāṭṭamum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa camattappiṟāptikaḷum nāṅ kaḷ Uṭaiyapaṭikaḷile caṇḍeśvaravilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta Ippaṟṟukku Ituve vilai
yolaiyum poruṭcelavu Olaiyumāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭavuṅ kāṇavum kaṭavarkaḷanṟi vilaikStope here.
Digital edition of SII 23.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
